notes: Store-credit success-path capture creates a disposable customer, uses storeCreditAccountCredit with the customer id to create the store credit account, then replays account-id credit/debit mutations and downstream reads.

Cleanup debits the remaining captured balance back to zero and deletes the disposable customer. Store credit account identifiers may remain visible in Shopify audit/history even after balance neutralization.

A positive amount must be used to debit a store credit account

The store credit account does not have sufficient funds to satisfy the request
The operation would cause the account's credit limit to be exceeded
